response.original_title: Infinity Train: Book One - The Perennial Child
response.overview: Join Tulip on a mind-bending journey aboard the mysterious Infinity Train, alongside her companions Atticus, the canine king of Corginia, and One-One, a robot with dueling personalities. With puzzles and perils awaiting them in every car and the relentless Steward on their trail, will Tulip ever find a way off the train and return home?
response.tagline: “I’m on a big train?! Like, a really big train?!”
response.title: Infinity Train: Book One - The Perennial Child
